title: PINT
description: Pouring IPA for Network Trust - CSH WiFi EAP-TLS enrollment and home RadSec management

nameOverride.description: Override the chart name used in resource names.

fullnameOverride.description: Override the fully qualified resource name.

name.description: ServiceAccount name. Defaults to the full chart name.

envSecret.description: Name of the pre-existing Secret containing PINT_CLIENT_SECRET and PINT_IPA_PASSWORD.

config.description: Non-sensitive PINT application configuration, rendered into a ConfigMap.

serverURL.description: Public base URL of this service (e.g. https://pint.csh.rit.edu). Login and callback URLs are derived from this.

ipaServiceAccount.description: FreeIPA service account DN used to issue certificates.

ipaCAName.description: FreeIPA CA name for WiFi client certificates.

ipaRadSecCAName.description: FreeIPA CA name for RadSec certificates.

ipaCertProfile.description: Dogtag certificate profile for WiFi client certs.

ipaRadSecClientCertProfile.description: Dogtag certificate profile for RadSec router client certs.

ipaRadSecServerCertProfile.description: Dogtag certificate profile for the FreeRADIUS server cert.

ipaSkipTLSVerify.description: Skip TLS verification when connecting to FreeIPA. For development only.

wifiSSID.description: WiFi SSID embedded in generated device profiles.

radiusServer.description: RadSec server address shown to users (e.g. radius.csh.rit.edu:2083).

secrets.description: Names of the Kubernetes Secrets PINT creates and manages at runtime.

radiusClients.description: Secret storing the RADIUS client list (clients.json).

radiusConfig.description: Secret storing the rendered FreeRADIUS clients.conf.

radSecCert.description: Secret storing the FreeRADIUS TLS certificate and key.

enabled.description: Deploy the PINT pod. Set false to run PINT as a local process instead.

tag.description: Image tag. Defaults to the chart appVersion.

service.description: Kubernetes Service for the PINT web application.

tag.description: Image tag. Defaults to the chart appVersion.

nodePort.description: NodePort number. Only used when service.type is NodePort.

statusServer.description: FreeRADIUS status virtual server for PINT auth statistics.

enabled.description: Enable the FreeRADIUS status virtual server and PINT statistics queries.

clientCIDR.description: Source CIDR allowed to query the status server.

enabled.description: Create an OpenShift Route for the PINT service.

host.description: Route hostname. Omit for an auto-assigned hostname.
